top.title: US and French nationals test positive for hantavirus after leaving ship
top.summary: The American national has arrived in Nebraska, while a French woman is isolating in Paris.

top.title: Trump calls Iran response to US proposal to end war 'totally unacceptable'
top.summary: Iran is reported to want lifting of the US naval blockade, recognition of Iranian sovereignty over the Strait of Hormuz and compensation for war damage.

top.title: Philippine VP Sara Duterte impeached for a second time
top.summary: If convicted in a Senate trial, which is uncertain, she will be disqualified from running for president.

top.title: How sunburn inspired a new way to store energy
top.summary: Molecules that can capture heat could be a useful technology to decarbonise heating.

top.title: TikTok scales back AI-generated video descriptions after absurd errors
top.summary: While only rolled out to some users, the feature's bizarre AI-generated descriptions were shared widely.

top.title: Instagram privacy tech is turned off today - what does this mean for your DMs?
top.summary: The platform said it would remove end-to-end encrypted messages, a major U‑turn by parent company Meta.
